summary: Copilot-generated draft PR adding SKSamplingOptions overloads to SKSurface.Draw and SKCanvas.DrawSurface (fixing regression #3344), closed by maintainer without merging because it manually edited SkiaApi.generated.cs and the code generator was crashing.

repoLinks.description: Draft PR by Copilot attempting to fix #3344 — closed without merging

versionAnalysis.relevanceReason: The C# wrapper overloads for DrawSurface/SKSurface.Draw with SKSamplingOptions are still missing on main. Only the P/Invoke sk_surface_draw_with_sampling is present in the generated file.

regression.reason: In v2.88.x, FilterQuality on SKPaint controlled sampling in DrawSurface. After the migration to SKSamplingOptions, no equivalent parameter was added to DrawSurface or SKSurface.Draw.

fixStatus.reason: Issue #3344 is still open. The P/Invoke for sk_surface_draw_with_sampling is present in SkiaApi.generated.cs on main, but the C# wrapper overloads (SKSurface.Draw and SKCanvas.DrawSurface with SKSamplingOptions) are not yet present.

analysis.summary: PR #3487 attempted to add the missing SKSamplingOptions parameter to SKSurface.Draw and SKCanvas.DrawSurface to fix regression #3344. The PR was closed as a draft because it manually edited SkiaApi.generated.cs (which must never be manually edited per project guidelines) and the code generator was crashing on typedef parsing. The P/Invoke binding sk_surface_draw_with_sampling now exists in the generated file on main, but the higher-level C# wrapper overloads are still missing.

codeInvestigation.finding: SKSurface.Draw(SKCanvas, float, float, SKPaint) exists but lacks an overload accepting SKSamplingOptions. The method calls sk_surface_draw which does not pass sampling options.
SKCanvas.DrawSurface has two overloads (with SKPoint and with float x/y) but neither accepts SKSamplingOptions. Both delegate to SKSurface.Draw.
P/Invoke declaration for sk_surface_draw_with_sampling is present in the generated file on main, accepting SKSamplingOptions* — the C API binding already exists. The C# wrapper just needs to call it.
DrawImage has full SKSamplingOptions overloads with the FilterQuality fallback pattern. This is the established template for adding the same overloads to DrawSurface.

keySignals.text: P/Invoke declarations in SkiaApi.generated.cs (manually added pending generator fix)
keySignals.interpretation: PR explicitly violated the coding standard of never manually editing generated files. This is the primary reason it was closed.

keySignals.text: Generator runs but crashes on typedef parsing (existing CppAst/ClangSharp issue)
keySignals.interpretation: Code generator was broken at time of PR — but the P/Invoke is now present in the generated file on main, suggesting the generator was later fixed and run.
PR explicitly targets the underlying bug. Issue #3344 remains open, confirming the fix was not accepted.
The SKPaint.FilterQuality path that previously controlled sampling quality was removed/deprecated in v3.x without an equivalent DrawSurface+SKSamplingOptions overload being added.

analysis.rationale: This is a type/bug fix attempt for a missing API (SKSamplingOptions overloads for DrawSurface/SKSurface.Draw) representing a compatibility regression from v2.88.x. The PR was correctly scoped to area/SkiaSharp with tenet/compatibility. However it violated the project rule against manually editing generated files and the generator was non-functional. With the P/Invoke now in place on main, the remaining work is straightforward: add C# wrapper overloads following the DrawImage pattern.
workarounds: Snapshot the surface to SKImage and use SKCanvas.DrawImage with SKSamplingOptions: `using var image = surface.Snapshot(); canvas.DrawImage(image, x, y, sampling);`
Use SKBitmap from the surface and draw via DrawBitmap.
nextQuestions: Was sk_surface_draw_with_sampling added to the C API header and implementation in the Skia submodule correctly, or only reflected in the generated binding file?
Is the C API implementation calling SkSurface::draw() with the correct sampling parameter?

resolution.hypothesis: The C API P/Invoke binding sk_surface_draw_with_sampling is already in place in SkiaApi.generated.cs. New C# wrapper overloads following the DrawImage pattern need to be added to SKSurface.Draw and SKCanvas.DrawSurface.

proposals.title: Add C# wrapper overloads for DrawSurface with SKSamplingOptions
proposals.description: Add SKSurface.Draw(SKCanvas, float, float, SKSamplingOptions, SKPaint) and corresponding SKCanvas.DrawSurface overloads following the DrawImage pattern. Use the sk_surface_draw_with_sampling P/Invoke already present in the generated file.

proposals.title: Workaround: snapshot to SKImage then DrawImage
proposals.description: Use SKSurface.Snapshot() to get an SKImage, then use SKCanvas.DrawImage with full SKSamplingOptions support. All APIs are validated as correct and cross-platform safe.
proposals.codeSnippet:
using var image = surface.Snapshot();
canvas.DrawImage(image, destX, destY, new SKSamplingOptions(SKFilterMode.Linear, SKMipmapMode.None));

resolution.recommendedProposal: Add C# wrapper overloads for DrawSurface with SKSamplingOptions
resolution.recommendedReason: The P/Invoke is already in place. Adding wrapper overloads following the established DrawImage pattern is straightforward and fixes the regression properly for all callers.

actionability.reason: The P/Invoke layer (sk_surface_draw_with_sampling) is already present in the generated file on main. Only the C# wrapper overloads for SKSurface.Draw and SKCanvas.DrawSurface need to be added, following the existing DrawImage pattern.

actions.description: Apply bug, area/SkiaSharp, and compatibility tenet labels
Cross-reference to the original bug issue #3344
Post analysis explaining current state and remaining work needed
actions.comment:
This draft PR was closed without merging because it manually edited `SkiaApi.generated.cs` (which must never be hand-edited per project guidelines) and the code generator was crashing.

Current state on `main`:
- ✅ `sk_surface_draw_with_sampling` P/Invoke is present in `SkiaApi.generated.cs` (regenerated since PR was closed)
- ❌ C# wrapper overloads — `SKSurface.Draw(SKCanvas, float, float, SKSamplingOptions, SKPaint)` and `SKCanvas.DrawSurface(SKSurface, float, float, SKSamplingOptions, SKPaint)` — are **not** present

To complete the fix for #3344: add the C# wrapper overloads following the `DrawImage` pattern in `SKCanvas.cs` (lines 462–505), using the existing `sk_surface_draw_with_sampling` P/Invoke.

**Workaround until fixed:**
```csharp
using var image = surface.Snapshot();
canvas.DrawImage(image, destX, destY, new SKSamplingOptions(SKFilterMode.Linear, SKMipmapMode.None));
```
